reference: Hi, I had a procedure done where I had to have two large kidney stones removed. They went up through my urethra and were broken up. I now have a stent in place to help me pass the grit and gravel that remains. There is a string there. I have a question: I know you probably can't have sexual intercourse, but I was curious if, with care, my husband and I may engage in anal sex?
text: Hi, I had a procedure done where I had to have two large pudding stones removed, a lip up through my urethra, and were broken up. I now have a stent in place to help me pass the grit and gravel that was... There is a string there. I have a question. I know you probably can't have sexual reports, but I'm just curious if, with care, my husband and I may engage in anal sex...
